title: AssessmentItem
description: A single practisable or gradable item: workbook question, quiz question, scenario, hard question, interview prompt, flashcard, mock-exam or final-assessment question. Unifies every question-like object in the academy.

item_type.description: Kind of item, driving how it is presented and marked.

module_id.description: Owning module id where applicable, e.g. 'module-05'.

theme.description: Theme tag used for filtered practice and weak-tag routing.

prompt.description: The question or scenario prompt shown to the learner.

options.description: Answer options for multiple_choice items only.

correct_answer.description: Correct option or expected key answer, for auto-markable items.

flip.description: The reveal side for flashcard items.

model_answer.description: Model answer text where a full worked answer exists.

marking_points.description: Bullet points a strong answer must cover; the marking rubric input.

difficulty.description: Cognitive demand; judgement items carry the most marks at Level 4.

marks.description: Marks available, for mock-exam and final-assessment items.

source_path.description: Repo-relative path to the file this item was imported from.
